name: product-methodology
description: 产品方法论 skills：判断方向该不该做（true-demand）+ 推进产品阶段（product-stagegate）。Product-methodology skills for AI agents.

plugins.name: true-demand
plugins.description: 诊断罗盘：用户不必预先分类问题，自动判断商业卡点在「价值/共识/模式/求真」哪一环，给出带量化成败信号的最小验证动作。Diagnoses whether a product/demand problem is blocked on value, consensus, mode, or weak validation.

plugins.name: product-stagegate
plugins.description: 推进关卡：按 Demo→MVP→PMF→GTM→MTU 五关推进，用真实数据判断是否通关、给下一步或止损，并先判断项目是否适用本框架。Drives a product through validated lifecycle gates with real-data pass/fail checks.
